mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, role, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id != #{excludeUserId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
